info.name: Utility Asset Maintenance Tracker API
info.description: API collection for testing the Utility Asset Maintenance Tracker service

request.description: Creates a new maintenance plan with tasks. Frequency can be 'Monthly' or 'Quarterly'.
Retrieves all maintenance plans with their associated tasks.

item.name: Get Maintenance Plans by Asset ID

request.description: Retrieves maintenance plans for a specific asset ID.
Updates an existing maintenance plan. Replace '1' in the URL with the actual plan ID.
Opens the Swagger UI documentation in the browser.
